rationale: A signature is a primitive tuple of symbol sets with an arity map defined inline; it bottoms out at a definitional truth (root=definitional_truth) and references no prior node. Empty dependency set is correct.
notes: The arity map is constructed inline here, so this does NOT depend on def:arity; rather def:arity depends on def:signature. Empty deps is required to avoid a signature<->arity cycle. The constant/function/relation symbol sets are introduced here, not imported.
